hero.title: A Network of AI Agents That Runs Your Business
hero.lead: wolfpoint.ai deploys a coordinated network of specialized AI agents across your operations. Each agent owns a domain — code, sales, marketing, data, communications — sharing memory, routing tasks automatically, and getting smarter together.
hero.subtext: Stop managing one chatbot. Run a network of AI specialists that coordinate in real time, across your entire stack.
hero.subHighlight: The distributed agent network built for serious teams.

governedDataProducts.title: Specialized Agents, Each Owning a Domain
governedDataProducts.description: Code agents ship features. Sales agents close deals. Marketing agents track competitors. Every specialist operates autonomously in their domain — all coordinated by a root supervisor with full visibility across the network.

unifiedLakehouseFabric.title: Shared Memory Across Every Agent
unifiedLakehouseFabric.description: One knowledge graph, shared by the entire network. Contacts, preferences, deals, and decisions are extracted automatically and available to every agent — across every session, every channel, every conversation.

agenticAutomation.title: Durable Execution at Every Layer
agenticAutomation.description: Temporal-powered workflows keep every agent running reliably. From deal pipelines to competitor monitoring to autonomous coding — each task runs to completion with full audit trails and zero dropped balls.

items.label: Specialized Agent Teams
items.description: Personal assistant, code agent, data team, marketing & sales, deal management, and veterinary cardiology — each with their own tools, memory, and expertise, coordinated by a single network supervisor.

items.label: Live Integrations
items.description: 10+ OAuth-connected integrations with automatic token refresh. Your agents read emails, manage calendar events, track Jira issues, and communicate via WhatsApp — without you lifting a finger.

items.label: Shared Knowledge System
items.description: Automatic extraction from every interaction. Every agent in the network draws from the same live knowledge graph — contacts, companies, deals, preferences, and decisions, always in context.

features.heading: Everything Your Agent Network Needs
features.subtitle: From orchestration to shared memory — one platform for building AI agent networks that actually run your operations.

connectEverySource.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
connectEverySource.description: A hierarchical agent network with a root supervisor routing tasks to specialized teams. Each agent has tools, instructions, and domain expertise. Coordination happens automatically — no manual routing required.

semanticControlPlane.title: Network-Wide Shared Memory
semanticControlPlane.description: One knowledge graph, shared across every agent. Entity extraction, relation mapping, lead scoring, and contextual recall persist across every session. Every new interaction makes the entire network smarter.

agentAutomationStudio.title: Durable Workflow Automation
agentAutomationStudio.description: Temporal-powered workflows for complex multi-step processes. Deal pipelines, competitor monitoring, inbox triage, code tasks — all running in parallel across the network, with retry logic and full audit trails.

featuresGrid.heading: Everything your agent network needs to run
featuresGrid.subtitle: Specialized agents, shared memory, real integrations — built for teams that ship

multiAgentTeams.title: Distributed Agent Network
multiAgentTeams.description: A coordinated network of specialists — code, sales, marketing, data, personal assistant — each owning their domain, all sharing the same memory and routing layer

persistentMemory.title: Network-Wide Memory
persistentMemory.description: One knowledge graph shared by every agent. Contacts, deals, preferences, and decisions persist across every session and channel

aiChat.title: Luna — Your AI Chief of Staff
aiChat.description: The conversational interface to your entire agent network. Luna routes tasks, recalls context, and coordinates the specialists behind the scenes

oauthIntegrations.title: Real Tool Access
oauthIntegrations.description: Gmail, Calendar, WhatsApp, Jira, GitHub — agents work inside your actual tools with auto-refresh OAuth credentials

durableWorkflows.title: Durable Workflows
durableWorkflows.description: Temporal-powered automation across 4 task queues. Every agent task runs to completion with retry logic and full audit trails

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.description: Multi-tenant isolation, encrypted credential vault, JWT auth, and Kubernetes-native deployment — production-grade from day one

autonomousCodeAgent.title: Autonomous Code Agent
autonomousCodeAgent.description: A dedicated coding specialist in your network. Creates branches, implements features, runs tests, and opens PRs — autonomously, with full traceability

marketingIntelligence.title: Marketing Intelligence
marketingIntelligence.description: A marketing specialist that monitors competitors, manages ad campaigns across Meta, Google, and TikTok, and surfaces market signals automatically

proactiveInboxMonitor.title: Always-On Inbox Agent
proactiveInboxMonitor.description: A proactive communications specialist that monitors Gmail and Calendar, triages what matters, extracts contacts, and never lets an important email slip

lakehouse.heading: Why a Network Beats a Single Chatbot
lakehouse.description: One agent hits a wall fast. A coordinated network of specialists scales with your business.

unifiedGovernance.title: The Complexity Problem
unifiedGovernance.description: Real work spans multiple domains — coding, analysis, marketing, client communications. A single agent can't do it all well. A network of specialists divides and conquers, each running in parallel on their own domain.

programmablePipelines.title: The Memory Problem
programmablePipelines.description: Chatbots forget everything between sessions. wolfpoint.ai's network shares a single knowledge graph — contacts, deals, preferences, and decisions persist across every agent, every conversation, every channel.

compliantCollaboration.title: The Integration Problem
compliantCollaboration.description: Agents are useless without access to your real tools. OAuth integrations with Gmail, Calendar, WhatsApp, Jira, and more give every agent in the network live access to what's actually happening in your business.

secondary.heading: What Comes Built In
secondary.description: Ready to run from day one — no assembly required.

adaptiveGuardrails.title: Luna — Your AI Chief of Staff
adaptiveGuardrails.description: The conversational front door to your agent network. Luna learns from every interaction — extracts contacts, monitors your inbox, scores leads, coordinates specialists, and gets sharper over time.

explainableDecisions.title: Autonomous Code Agent
explainableDecisions.description: A dedicated coding specialist that runs in isolation. Creates branches, implements features, runs tests, and opens pull requests — without you having to write a single line of prompt.

lakehouseSignals.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
lakehouseSignals.description: Multi-tenant isolation, Fernet-encrypted credential vault, JWT authentication, and full audit trails. Deploy on your own GKE cluster with Helm charts. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

architecture.heading: How the Network is Built
architecture.description: A production-grade distributed architecture with real-time coordination and persistent shared memory.

dataIntegrationLayer.title: Integration Layer
dataIntegrationLayer.description: OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Jira), WhatsApp Business API, MCP tool server, and encrypted credential vault — every agent in the network has live access to your real tools.

semanticGovernanceLayer.title: Orchestration Layer
semanticGovernanceLayer.description: Root supervisor pattern with hierarchical routing. Tasks are dispatched to the right specialist automatically. Full visibility into what every agent is doing, in real time.

executionLayer.title: Execution Layer
executionLayer.description: Temporal durable workflows across 4 queues: orchestration, data, code, and business. Inbox monitoring, competitor tracking, deal pipelines, and code tasks — all running in parallel, reliably.

agenticExecutionLayer.title: Intelligence Layer
agenticExecutionLayer.description: Shared knowledge graph with entity extraction, relation mapping, and contextual recall. Multi-LLM router supporting Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, and more. Every agent draws from the same live context.

ai.heading: Specialists Across Every Domain
ai.description: Deploy dedicated AI specialists across your operations. Each one owns their domain, shares the same memory, and coordinates automatically with the rest of the network.

insightCopilots.title: Luna — Personal AI Chief of Staff
insightCopilots.description: Email management, calendar coordination, WhatsApp communication, inbox monitoring, Jira tracking, and proactive follow-ups. Luna is the conversational hub of your entire agent network.

composableSkills.title: Data & Analytics Team
composableSkills.description: Data analyst, report generator, and knowledge manager working in concert. SQL queries, dataset analysis, automated Excel/PDF reports, and knowledge graph management — on demand.

closedLoopActuators.title: Autonomous Code Agent
closedLoopActuators.description: A dedicated coding specialist running in an isolated environment. Creates feature branches, implements code, runs tests, and opens pull requests — with full traceability and zero manual overhead.

marketingSales.title: Marketing & Sales Team
marketingSales.description: Ad campaign management across Meta, Google, and TikTok. Competitor monitoring on a 24-hour cycle. Lead scoring with configurable rubrics. Always working, always surfacing what matters.

dealTeam.title: Deal Team
dealTeam.description: A full pipeline specialist: discover, score, research, outreach, advance, and sync. Automated deal workflows with multi-step research and stakeholder coordination — handled end to end.

vetCardiology.title: Veterinary Cardiology (HealthPets)
vetCardiology.description: Cardiac analyst, billing agent, and vet supervisor built for veterinary clinics. Monthly billing workflows, usage tracking, and specialized medical analysis — a network built for a specific domain.

roadmap.heading: What We're Building Next
roadmap.subtitle: Expanding the network with more specialists, deeper memory, and open extensions.

marketplaceConnectors.title: SRE & Infrastructure Agents
marketplaceConnectors.description: Alert triage, pattern detection, cloud architecture design, and infrastructure troubleshooting. Ops-focused specialists that monitor your stack and surface issues before they become incidents.

adaptiveGovernanceAi.title: Deeper Memory & Proactive Recall
adaptiveGovernanceAi.description: Cross-session context threading, memory-driven automations, and proactive surfacing. Your network anticipates what you need before you ask.

autonomousFinopsSuites.title: Open Skill Marketplace
autonomousFinopsSuites.description: Community-built agent skills, tool connectors, and workflow templates. Extend your network with pre-built specialists — no code required.

memory.heading: One Memory. Every Agent. Always On.
memory.description: Your entire agent network draws from a single, continuously updated knowledge graph. Every interaction teaches every agent. Luna extracts people, companies, preferences, and decisions automatically — and the whole network benefits instantly.

ctaBanner.heading: Your agent network is ready to deploy
ctaBanner.description: Create your account and launch your first specialists in minutes. Luna comes ready — she'll start learning your contacts, preferences, and workflows from the very first conversation.

testimonials.heading: Built for Builders
testimonials.subtitle: How teams are using wolfpoint.ai to run operations with a distributed agent network

items.quote: We went from a single chatbot to a full agent network in two weeks. Luna handles client communications while the code agent ships features autonomously. The shared memory means nothing falls through the cracks — every agent knows the full context.
items.author: AI Engineering Lead

items.quote: The code agent is unlike anything I've seen. It creates branches, implements features, and opens PRs on its own. Combined with the marketing intelligence agent and shared knowledge graph, it genuinely feels like a team that gets smarter every day.
items.author: CTO

cta.heading: Ready to Deploy Your Agent Network?
cta.description: Launch a coordinated network of AI specialists today. Create your account and have Luna, your AI chief of staff, running in minutes.
